name: twse-cli
description: Agent-friendly CLI for Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE) OpenAPI — 143 endpoints, one tool

commands.name: twse fetch
commands.description: Fetch data from any TWSE endpoint by dotted name, raw path, or API code

commands.name: twse endpoints
commands.description: Discover and search TWSE OpenAPI endpoints

commands.name: twse schema
commands.description: Inspect endpoint schema: field names, types, examples

notes: All TWSE values are strings by default; use --normalize to convert
143 endpoints in 4 categories: stock (44), company (86), broker (9), other (4)
